commit_message:
test(adw): guard against MX_AGENT_* env-naming drift in src/

Add a vitest regression guard that prevents the recent control-plane env
rename from silently drifting. Canonical knobs are now `ADW_*` with
deprecated `MX_AGENT_*` compatibility aliases; the alias machinery
(`ENV_ALIASES`, `modelEnvAlias`, `readEnvAlias`/`readEnvFlag`) lives only
in `src/env-vars.ts`. The guard fails if any new bare `MX_AGENT_*` read is
reintroduced elsewhere in `src/` as if it were canonical.

- adw_sdlc/test/env-naming-drift.test.ts (new, +6): scans every
  `src/**/*.ts` except the sanctioned `env-vars.ts` for a bracket
  (`env['MX_AGENT_X']`) or dot (`process.env.MX_AGENT_X`) read of an
  `MX_AGENT_*` key, reporting offending `file:line` on failure. The
  `MX_AGENT_[A-Z]` + access-shape discriminator excludes today's
  legitimate mentions (deny-prefix constant `'MX_AGENT_'`, `--help`
  text, prose comments, the alias-table values) by construction, so the
  tree stays green. `//` comments are stripped before matching.
- Detector self-test (positive + negative fixtures) proves the guard
  actually fires and does not false-positive; a source-of-truth check
  ties it to `ENV_ALIASES` + `modelEnvAlias` so a new alias auto-extends
  the guard's intent.
- adw_sdlc/HANDOVER.md: record §8w and bump the test count to
  546 tests / 39 files.

No production-code change: `src/env-vars.ts` and the secret boundary are
untouched; `MX_AGENT_*` keeps working as a deprecated alias. The optional
docs/prompts scan is deferred (generated prompts are covered by
`pack:check`; committed docs already mark `MX_AGENT_*` as legacy).

Verification: `npm run verify` green (typecheck, lint:env, pack:check,
546 tests, build+clean). Negative proof: injecting a bare
`process.env['MX_AGENT_RUNNER']` read into `src/exec.ts` fails the guard
with that `file:line`; reverting restores green.

closes #6
pr_body:
# fix: drift guard for `ADW_*` env naming

Closes #6. Part of the MVP live-run batch (`adw_sdlc/docs/LIVE-RUN-BATCH.md`).

## Summary

Guards the recent control-plane env rename — canonical `ADW_*` with
deprecated `MX_AGENT_*` compatibility aliases — against silent regression.
The alias machinery (`ENV_ALIASES`, `modelEnvAlias`, and the only sanctioned
readers `readEnvAlias`/`readEnvFlag`) lives entirely in `src/env-vars.ts`.
This change adds a lightweight vitest guard that fails if a **new** bare
`MX_AGENT_*` read is reintroduced anywhere in `src/` outside `env-vars.ts`,
as if the legacy name were canonical.

**Test-only / no production change.** `src/env-vars.ts` and the secret
boundary are untouched; `MX_AGENT_*` keeps working as a deprecated alias.

## Changes

- **`adw_sdlc/test/env-naming-drift.test.ts`** (new, +6 tests) — scans every
  `src/**/*.ts` except the sanctioned `env-vars.ts` for a bracket
  (`env['MX_AGENT_X']`) or dot (`process.env.MX_AGENT_X`) read of an
  `MX_AGENT_*` key; reports each offending `file:line` on failure. Includes:
  - a **detector self-test** (positive + negative fixtures) so the guard
    can't rot into a trivially-true no-op or false-positive on the
    legitimate mentions (deny-prefix constant, `--help` text, prose
    comments, alias-table values);
  - a **source-of-truth coverage** check tied to `ENV_ALIASES` +
    `modelEnvAlias`, so adding a new alias automatically extends the guard;
  - `//`-comment stripping before matching, to avoid flagging
    commented-out example reads.
- **`adw_sdlc/HANDOVER.md`** — records §8w and bumps the test count to
  **546 tests / 39 files**.

## Design notes

- **Discriminator:** a real read always has an uppercase letter immediately
  after the `MX_AGENT_` prefix **and** uses bracket/dot access. That
  excludes every legitimate mention in the current tree by construction (no
  allowlist needed) — verified against `src/env-vars.ts`, `src/env.ts`
  (`ENV_DENY_PREFIXES`), and the `src/cli.ts` `--help` text.
- **Scope:** the issue's optional docs/prompts scan is deferred — generated
  `.adw/prompts` are covered by `pack:check`, and committed docs already
  mark `MX_AGENT_*` as legacy. No `.adw/` or production `src/` edits.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] The guard fails if a new bare `MX_AGENT_*` read is added to `src/`
      outside `env-vars.ts`.
- [x] Existing canonical `ADW_*` usage passes (tree is green today).
- [x] `npm run verify` stays green.

## Verification

- `npm run verify` → green (typecheck, `lint:env`, `pack:check`,
  **546 tests / 39 files**, build + `dist/` cleanup).
- Negative proof: injecting `process.env['MX_AGENT_RUNNER']` into
  `src/exec.ts` fails the guard with `adw_sdlc/src/exec.ts:<line>` detail;
  reverting restores green.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

work_item.title: fix: drift guard for ADW_* env naming in docs/prompts
